kiwi.rewardUnitNote: Paid as Kiwi cashback ('Kiwis') to the linked UPI account.

source.note: Kiwi revised reward rates and expanded MCC exclusions effective 1 May 2025.

source.title: Kiwi Rewards Policy
source.quote: 1.5% cashback on Scan & Pay UPI transactions.

source.title: Kiwi Help Centre — Rewards
source.quote: Certain merchant categories such as fuel, jewellery, utilities do not qualify for Kiwi rewards.

kiwi.notes: Kiwi Neon membership offers a higher rate (not modelled). Excluded MCCs earn zero.

amazon_pay_icici.cardName: Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card
amazon_pay_icici.rewardUnitNote: Paid as Amazon Pay balance (1 reward = ₹1).

source.title: About Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card
source.quote: 5% back for Prime members on Amazon.in.

source.title: About Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card
source.quote: 3% back for non-Prime members on Amazon.in.

source.title: About Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card
source.quote: 1% back on all other payments.

amazon_pay_icici.notes: Amazon Pay partner-merchant list is dynamic and not populated here; unmatched merchants earn 1%.

source.note: Monthly cashback cap has been revised historically (reported ₹5,000 then ₹2,000). Verify the current cap.

source.title: Cashback SBI Card — Revision of Benefits
source.quote: 5% cashback on online spends; not applicable on Utility, Insurance, Fuel, Rent, Wallet, Jewellery, School & Merchant EMI (defined by MCC).

sbi_cashback.notes: SBI is reported to use an internal category mapping that can override public MCC definitions — a known source of cashback disputes.

source.title: Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card
source.quote: 10% cashback on Swiggy app spends.

source.title: Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card
source.quote: 5% cashback on online spends (MCC-based; capped ₹1,500 per statement cycle).

hdfc_swiggy.notes: The 5% online tier is MCC-based. Amazon settles as MCC 5262 (Marketplaces), excluded from 5% — so Amazon earns only the 1% base rate.

cred.rewardUnitNote: Rewards accrue as CRED Coins / points, not direct cash; redemption value varies.

source.note: CRED Coins are loyalty points; UPI/scan-and-pay reward rates vary and are approximate.

source.title: CRED Terms & Conditions
source.quote: Users earn CRED Coins / reward points on eligible spends via the CRED app.

cred.notes: Reward currency is CRED Coins, whose cash-equivalent value is variable — confidence is intentionally modest.

source.title: Flipkart Axis Bank Credit Card — Benefits
source.quote: 5% cashback on Flipkart and Cleartrip.

source.title: Flipkart Axis Bank Credit Card — Benefits
source.quote: 4% unlimited cashback on Swiggy, Uber, PVR and cult.fit.

source.title: Flipkart Axis — 1.5% unlimited cashback
source.quote: 1.5% unlimited cashback on all other spends; not eligible on fuel, wallet loads, gift cards, EMI.

flipkart_axis.notes: Cashback not eligible on fuel spends, wallet loads, gift-card purchases, and EMI per official proposition terms.

source.note: 5% on bill payments applies only via Google Pay (channel-specific, not modelled here).

source.title: Axis Bank ACE Credit Card
source.quote: 4% cashback on Swiggy, Zomato and Ola; 5%+4% categories share a ₹500/month cap.

source.title: Axis Bank ACE Credit Card
source.quote: 2% cashback on all other spends.

source.title: Axis ACE T&C — excluded MCCs
source.quote: MCCs 5541 (fuel), 6051 (quasi-cash/wallet) and 6012 (financial) are excluded from cashback. [Verify against Axis T&C PDF]

axis_ace.notes: 5% cashback on utility/telecom bill payments applies only when paid via Google Pay — a channel we do not yet detect, so it is not claimed here.

hdfc_millennia.rewardUnitNote: Earned as CashPoints (1 CashPoint = ₹1 towards statement cashback).

source.title: HDFC Bank Millennia Credit Card
source.quote: 5% CashBack on Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy, Zomato, Myntra, Uber, cult.fit, BookMyShow, Sony LIV, Tata CLiQ.

source.title: Millennia FAQ
source.quote: 1% CashBack on other spends except Fuel, EMI, Wallet, Rent Payments and Govt Related transactions.

rules.label: Fuel / EMI / wallet / rent / govt (no reward)

hdfc_millennia.notes: CashPoints on the 5% tier are capped at 1,000 per month and redeemable 1 CashPoint = ₹1 for statement cashback.

idfc_first_millennia.rewardUnitNote: Reward Points; 1 RP ≈ ₹0.25 on redemption. Points never expire.

source.note: Multiplier bands and category exclusions are simplified; verify exact bands against IDFC FIRST T&C.

source.title: FIRST Millennia Credit Card — Benefits
source.quote: 3X reward points on online spends for spends up to ₹20,000 per month.

idfc_first_millennia.notes: Reward-point value is an estimate (₹0.25/point). Incremental spends above ₹20k/month may earn a higher multiplier — not modelled.

sbi_simplyclick.rewardUnitNote: Reward Points; 1 RP ≈ ₹0.25. ₹500 Amazon voucher as welcome benefit.
sbi_simplyclick.welcomeBenefit: ₹500 Amazon.in gift voucher on fee payment (one-time).

source.title: SimplyCLICK SBI Card — Benefits
source.quote: Earn 10X Reward Points on online spends with exclusive partners.

source.title: SimplyCLICK T&C — Reward Points
source.quote: 5X Reward Points on all online spends other than exclusive partners, capped at 10,000 Reward Points per calendar month.

sbi_simplyclick.notes: 5X points cap is 10,000 RP/month (≈ ₹2,500 value). Point value is an estimate (₹0.25/point).
